PM forecast history

Latest PM vs subcontract comparison

Executive narrative

Billcode reconciliation matrix

Click any row to push it into the inspector. Latest PM period is compared with the current subcontract snapshot.

Risk & Opportunity by Code

Production basis: Projected Cost Forecast / PM Forecast minus Cost-at-Completion. Positive values are opportunity / cushion; negative values are risk / underforecast. Original bid Budget is reference-only.

System / Linear Risk & Opportunity Lens

Primary control view for potential risk/opportunity by Billcode. Compares PM Forecast/CAC against System Projected Forecast where available, and against a linear extrapolated EAC based on scope completion and actual budget used.
Sign convention: Delta = PM Forecast − Comparator. Positive means PMF is above the comparator and may contain cushion/opportunity. Negative means the comparator exceeds PMF and should be reviewed as potential underforecast risk.
Important v23 behavior: The top “Latest period risk / opportunity by Billcode” chart and table now use the same active Delta Lens, Risk View, Category/Class filter, Scope Bucket filter, threshold, and sort settings. Use Show All Deltas to view red and green together, sorted by magnitude.
PMF − CAC DeltaΔ_cac(k) = PMF(k) − CAC(k)
System DeltaΔ_sys(k) = PMF(k) − SPF(k)
Linear EAC DeltaP_scope(k) = Q_complete(k) / Q_projected(k) EAC_linear(k) = AC(k) / P_scope(k) Δ_linear(k) = PMF(k) − EAC_linear(k)

Linearity / scope-completion QA

Risk / Opportunity Group Summary

Groups the same active risk/opportunity rows by category/class, scope-completion bucket, or risk/opportunity status.

Scope Completion Histogram

Shows where risk/opportunity dollars sit by progress band. This helps isolate low-progress extrapolation risk from mature cost-code exposure.

Subcontractor detail

PM latest by billcode

PM period matrix

Cross-source exception engine

Formula Atlas / Governed Reconciliation Math

Clean formulas and management meaning. Excel syntax is intentionally replaced by production-control definitions.

Validation Center / Production Hardening

Compares loaded data, filtered totals, formula outputs, and slicer behavior so the dashboard can be trusted as a controlled project-controls product.

Export / Documentation Package

Export source manifest, validation report, formula dictionary, risk/opportunity register, reconciliation register, and a Markdown system note.

Data Health / QA

This panel checks join quality, missing keys, phase alignment, duplicate keys, negative values, and snapshot limitations.

No-Regression QA / Build Notes

Sources / Resource Center

Clarifies where every dataset comes from, lets a power-user maintain external GitHub/resource links, and documents the current source lineage behind the dashboard.

System Architecture

Standard target architecture for IPC project-controls HTML apps: source registry, normalization, governed formulas, QA, narrative, scenarios, and exports.

IPC App Standards / Feature Adoption

Standard module catalog and recommended adoption path from the other JCCFCAST apps into this unified IPC platform.

Definitions

Unified Drilldown Inspector

Click a reconciliation row, subcontract row, or PM row. Use the controls below to dock, float, compact, or hide this panel.
Recommended working mode: Drawer for analysis, Hide for presentation, Bottom for wide tables.
